title: Rich Kenyan Rice Bake
description: A buttery, pillowy rice casserole that harks back to Kenyan home cooking, sweetened with honey and finished with a cheesy papillote.
instructions: Rinse the basmati rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
Whisk together the melted butter, honey, almond milk, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, and black pepper in a medium bowl.
Spread a sheet of parchment paper in a 9x9 inch baking dish and pour the rice evenly.
Pour the butter mixture over the rice and stir to coat thoroughly.
Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese over the top of the rice.
Cover the dish with another sheet of parchment paper, sealing the edges to create a papillote.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the top parchment, uncover, and bake an additional 5 minutes until the cheese is golden.
